# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- **[X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives** — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- **[ ] Officer or Employee** — Employing Office: ______ (File an original and 1 copy)
- **Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No
- **Report type:** [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
- **Date of Report Being Amended:** ______
- Stamp: LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER, 2019 JAN 11 AM 10:20, OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES. "HAND DELIVERED."
- Note: *A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

The transaction grid on this page contains only the greyed example row (Mega Corp. Common Stock) and the notation **"Please see the attached"** — no real data rows.
